/CAL:PD MOTION FOR RELEASE/ARG&SUB/ACM/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE ON HOMEDETENTION/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL POSESS NO DRUGS & POSESS NO WEAPONS/X:ASA CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ANDIS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP//X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:THE COURT CONFIRMS THE FUTURE DATE/DOP/
/CAL:APD PRCS FILING/CAL:PETITION TO REVOKE POST RELEASE COMMUNITY SUPERVISION PURSUANT TO PC 3455/PD/CTORD: PRCS IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/SHER/NB/S12/TBH:20005286/CONTD:TS APD PRCS/DOP/

/CAL:TO SET APD PC3455/DAWT/X:FUTURE DATE OF 08-21-20 IS CONFIRMED/

/CAL: APD 3455 PC MOTION/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 12/TRANS 12: AT 1:30PM TO JOIN 20005286/
